stories.description: GDPR subscription cleanup on account deletion

tasks.whatToDo: Create the module toggle and Stripe configuration infrastructure: Add ModulesSettings and PaymentsModuleSettings POCOs with Enabled (bool) and Provider (string) properties. Add StripeSettings POCO with SecretKey, PublishableKey, WebhookSecret. Add configuration sections to appsettings.json (disabled by default) and appsettings.Development.json (with placeholder keys). Register services.Configure<>() calls in DependencyInjection.cs. Add helper method IsPaymentsModuleEnabled(IConfiguration) for conditional registration.

definitionOfDone.description: PaymentsModuleSettings, ModulesSettings, and StripeSettings POCOs exist with correct section names
appsettings.json contains Modules:Payments section (disabled) and Stripe section (empty keys)
appsettings.Development.json contains Stripe section with test placeholder keys
Settings registered in DI (ModulesSettings always, StripeSettings conditionally)
Extension method IsPaymentsModuleEnabled implemented with 3 unit tests
Solution builds and all tests pass

tasks.whatToDo: Create domain entities: SubscriptionPlan (Id, Name, Description, MonthlyPrice, YearlyPrice, StripePriceIdMonthly, StripePriceIdYearly, StripeProductId, TrialDays, IsFreeTier, IsDefault, IsPopular, Status, SortOrder, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt), PlanFeature (Id, PlanId, Key, Description, LimitValue, SortOrder), UserSubscription (Id, UserId, PlanId, Status, StripeSubscriptionId, StripeCustomerId, CurrentPeriodStart, CurrentPeriodEnd, TrialEnd, CanceledAt, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt), InvoiceRequest (Id, UserId, StripePaymentIntentId, CustomerType, FullName, CompanyName, Address, City, PostalCode, Country, FiscalCode, VatNumber, SdiCode, PecEmail, Status, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt, ProcessedAt). Create PlanStatus, SubscriptionStatus, CustomerType, InvoiceRequestStatus, BillingInterval enums. Add navigation properties.

definitionOfDone.description: All entities created with proper types and nullable annotations

tasks.whatToDo: Create EF Core entity configurations: SubscriptionPlanConfiguration (table name, indexes on Status/IsDefault, decimal precision), PlanFeatureConfiguration (composite unique index on PlanId, Key), UserSubscriptionConfiguration (index on UserId + Status, unique index on StripeSubscriptionId), InvoiceRequestConfiguration (index on UserId, index on Status). Add DbSet properties to ApplicationDbContext. Generate migration AddSubscriptionPayments.

definitionOfDone.description: 4 entity configurations created with proper constraints, indexes, and FK relationships

tasks.whatToDo: Create IPaymentGateway interface with methods: CreateCustomerAsync, CreateCheckoutSessionAsync, CreateCustomerPortalSessionAsync, CancelSubscriptionAsync, GetSubscriptionAsync, SyncPlanToProviderAsync. Create DTOs: CreateCheckoutRequest, SubscriptionDetails, SyncPlanRequest, ProductSyncResult. Create MockPaymentGateway in Seed.Infrastructure that returns deterministic fake data. Register conditionally in DI when module enabled.

definitionOfDone.description: IPaymentGateway interface defined with all 6 methods
4 gateway DTOs created as sealed records
MockPaymentGateway implemented with deterministic fake data and logging
6 unit tests for MockPaymentGateway, all passing
Solution builds and all tests pass

tasks.whatToDo: Add Stripe.net NuGet package. Create StripePaymentGateway implementing IPaymentGateway: CreateCustomerAsync -> CustomerService.CreateAsync(), CreateCheckoutSessionAsync -> SessionService.CreateAsync(), CreateCustomerPortalSessionAsync -> SessionService.CreateAsync(), CancelSubscriptionAsync -> SubscriptionService.CancelAsync(), GetSubscriptionAsync -> SubscriptionService.GetAsync(), SyncPlanToProviderAsync -> ProductService.CreateAsync/UpdateAsync() + PriceService.CreateAsync(). Register conditionally when module enabled and provider is Stripe.

definitionOfDone.description: StripePaymentGateway fully implements all 6 IPaymentGateway methods
Conditional DI registration (Stripe vs Mock vs disabled)

tasks.whatToDo: Create StripeWebhookController at POST /webhooks/stripe: validate Stripe signature, parse event type, dispatch to handler. Create IWebhookEventHandler and StripeWebhookEventHandler: handle checkout.session.completed, invoice.payment_succeeded, invoice.payment_failed, customer.subscription.updated, customer.subscription.deleted, customer.subscription.trial_will_end. Implement idempotency via IMemoryCache. Log events.

definitionOfDone.description: HTTP 200 for unknown event types, HTTP 400 for invalid signatures

tasks.whatToDo: Create GetPlansQuery and GetPlansQueryHandler: returns all plans with Status = Active, ordered by SortOrder, includes PlanFeatures, no auth required. Create DTOs: PlanDto, PlanFeatureDto. Create PlansController at api/v1.0/plans with AllowAnonymous GET. Controller only registered when payments module is enabled.

definitionOfDone.description: Query + Handler created following existing patterns
Endpoint returns plans with features, sorted by SortOrder, filtered by Status == Active
4 unit tests for handler, 2 integration tests for endpoint

tasks.whatToDo: Create CreateCheckoutSessionCommand and handler: Input PlanId, BillingInterval, UserId. Validate plan exists and is active. If user doesn't have StripeCustomerId, call CreateCustomerAsync. Call CreateCheckoutSessionAsync with correct Price ID, customer ID, trial days if applicable. Return checkout session URL. Create validator. Add endpoint POST api/v1.0/billing/checkout. Add audit log entry.

definitionOfDone.description: Stripe customer creation for first-time users
Correct price ID selected based on billing interval
Trial period included when plan has TrialDays > 0
Returns checkout URL via CheckoutSessionResponse DTO
Audit log entry on checkout session creation
Unit tests for handler (9 test cases), Validator tests (4 test cases)

tasks.whatToDo: Create GetMySubscriptionQuery and handler: returns current active/trialing subscription for UserId, includes plan details and features. Create CreatePortalSessionCommand and handler: gets user's StripeCustomerId, calls CreateCustomerPortalSessionAsync, returns portal URL. Create CancelSubscriptionCommand and handler: sets cancel_at_period_end via gateway, audit log entry. Add endpoints to BillingController.

definitionOfDone.description: GetMySubscription query returns subscription with plan details
Unit tests for all handlers (13 test cases)

tasks.whatToDo: Create commands and handlers in Seed.Application/Admin/Plans/: CreatePlanCommand (creates plan + features, syncs to Stripe), UpdatePlanCommand (updates plan, syncs to Stripe), ArchivePlanCommand (sets Status = Archived), GetPlansQuery (admin version), GetPlanByIdQuery. Create validators. Create AdminPlansController at api/v1.0/admin/plans. Add Plans permissions. Add audit log actions.

definitionOfDone.description: Create, Update, Archive commands with handlers and validators
Admin list query with subscriber counts
Unit tests for all handlers, Validator tests

tasks.whatToDo: Create queries in Seed.Application/Admin/Subscriptions/: GetSubscriptionMetricsQuery (MRR, active count, trialing count, churn rate), GetSubscriptionsListQuery (paginated, filters), GetSubscriptionDetailQuery. Create DTOs. Create AdminSubscriptionsController at api/v1.0/admin/subscriptions. Add Subscriptions permissions.

definitionOfDone.description: Metrics query calculates MRR, active count, trialing count, churn
List query with pagination and filtering
Unit tests for all three handlers
Integration test for metrics and list endpoints

tasks.whatToDo: Create RequiresPlanAttribute (accepts plan names). Create RequiresFeatureAttribute (accepts feature key). Create RequiresPlanAuthorizationHandler: check if module disabled, check user's plan, check status Active/Trialing, return 403. Create RequiresFeatureAuthorizationHandler. Register authorization policies. Add ISubscriptionAccessService in Application layer.

definitionOfDone.description: Guards pass always when module is disabled
HTTP 403 returned when user lacks required plan or feature
Unit tests for authorization handlers (17 new tests)

tasks.whatToDo: Extend MeResponse with subscription fields: CurrentPlan (name), PlanFeatures (list of feature keys), SubscriptionStatus, TrialEndsAt. Update GetMeQueryHandler to load user's active subscription with plan and features when payments module is enabled. When disabled, return null for subscription fields.

definitionOfDone.description: Handler loads subscription conditionally (only when module enabled)
Returns null/empty when module disabled or no subscription

tasks.whatToDo: Create PricingComponent at frontend/web/projects/app/src/app/pages/pricing/. Create BillingService with methods to call backend APIs. Create billing.models.ts with TypeScript interfaces. Implement pricing page: fetch plans, monthly/yearly toggle, plan cards with features, Most Popular badge, CTA buttons. Add route /pricing. Use Angular Material.

definitionOfDone.description: Pricing page renders all active plans
Free tier CTA links to registration
Paid plan CTA redirects to login if not authenticated

tasks.whatToDo: Add createCheckoutSession(planId, billingInterval) to BillingService. When authenticated user clicks Scegli piano, call checkout API and redirect to Stripe. Create CheckoutSuccessComponent at /billing/success showing confirmation. Create CheckoutCancelComponent at /billing/cancel. Add routes with authGuard.

definitionOfDone.description: Clicking plan CTA creates checkout session and redirects to Stripe
Success page rendered after successful checkout
Cancel page rendered when user cancels checkout
Trial CTA shows trial period when plan has trial

tasks.whatToDo: Create SubscriptionComponent at /billing/subscription. Add methods to BillingService: getMySubscription, createPortalSession, cancelSubscription. Implement subscription view: show current plan, status, price, renewal date, trial days, portal button, change plan button, cancel with dialog. Add route with authGuard.

definitionOfDone.description: Subscription details displayed correctly for all states
Trial days remaining shown when applicable

tasks.whatToDo: Create AdminPlansComponent (list) and AdminPlanEditComponent (create/edit dialog). Create AdminBillingService with admin API calls. Implement: plans list table with columns, create/edit plan dialog, archive with confirmation, subscriber count. Add admin route /admin/plans with permissionGuard. Add Piani to admin sidebar.

definitionOfDone.description: Plans list with all columns rendered
Create plan dialog with all fields + dynamic feature list

tasks.whatToDo: Create AdminSubscriptionsComponent. Implement: metrics cards, subscriptions list table with filters and pagination, detail view. Add admin route /admin/subscriptions with permissionGuard. Add Abbonamenti to admin sidebar navigation.

definitionOfDone.description: Metrics cards displayed with correct values
Subscriptions list with filtering and pagination
Detail view accessible via read-only dialog

tasks.whatToDo: Create SubscriptionService: exposes currentPlan signal, planFeatures signal, hasPlan(), hasFeature() methods (return true when module disabled). Create RequiresPlanDirective (*requiresPlan) for conditional rendering. Create requiresPlanGuard Angular route guard. Export from public-api.ts.

definitionOfDone.description: SubscriptionService exposes plan signals from auth/me data
All checks pass when payments module is disabled
Unit tests for service (9 tests), directive (3 tests), guard (3 tests)

tasks.whatToDo: Create commands/queries: CreateInvoiceRequestCommand, GetMyInvoiceRequestsQuery, GetInvoiceRequestsQuery (admin), UpdateInvoiceRequestStatusCommand (admin). Create validators. Add endpoints: POST /billing/invoice-request, GET /billing/invoice-requests, GET /admin/invoice-requests, PUT /admin/invoice-requests/{id}/status.

definitionOfDone.description: Create invoice request with all fiscal fields
User can view own invoice request history
Admin can list and update request status
Audit log on create and status change

tasks.whatToDo: Add Richiedi fattura button in subscription management. Create invoice request dialog/form: customer type toggle, fields for individual/company (name, address, CF, P.IVA, SDI, PEC), save fiscal data for reuse. Create invoice request history view. Admin side: add invoice requests list with status update.

definitionOfDone.description: Invoice request form with all fields and conditional rendering
Fiscal data pre-filled from previous requests
Admin can view and update request status

tasks.whatToDo: Extend IUserPurgeService / user deletion flow: Cancel active Stripe subscription via CancelSubscriptionAsync, Delete Stripe Customer via Stripe API, Anonymize UserSubscription records (remove UserId, keep data), Keep InvoiceRequest records for 10 years but anonymize personal data (keep fiscal codes for legal compliance). Ensure only runs when payments module is enabled.

definitionOfDone.description: InvoiceRequest kept 10 years with anonymized personal data
Integration tests for purge logic (3 tests)

tasks.whatToDo: Add Plans.Read, Plans.Create, Plans.Update, Subscriptions.Read to Permissions.cs and permissions array. Update RolesAndPermissionsSeeder to seed new permissions. Update PermissionSeeder in Bootstrap if separate. Add new permissions to frontend PERMISSIONS constant in shared-auth.

definitionOfDone.description: New permissions in Permissions.cs and GetAll() array
Seeder updated to create new permissions

tasks.whatToDo: Create extension method AddPaymentsModule that registers all payments-related services, controllers, and authorization handlers only when enabled. Ensure billing/webhook controllers not registered when module disabled. Verify when disabled: no payment routes in Swagger, guards pass always, no Stripe SDK initialized. Frontend: add config flag indicating if payments module is active.

definitionOfDone.description: Frontend hides payment UI when module disabled
Integration test verifying disabled module behavior (5 tests)
